name: Scallops (Dxdg05a)
recipeIngredient: a few drops of sesame oil
half a lb snow peas, fresh
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cornstarch, soy sauce, and sesame oil in a bowl; stir well and set aside.
2. Heat the wok with half the oil until smoke begins to rise. Add garlic and ginger, stir fry for 30 seconds.
3. Add snow peas, carrot, salt, and water. Stir fry for 3 minutes. Remove to a platter.
4. Heat the remaining oil in the wok. Stir fry green onions for 30 seconds.
5. Add scallops and stir fry constantly for 4 minutes.
6. Return the snow pea mixture and sauce to the wok. Bring to a boil.
7. Serve immediately. Enjoy!
